creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150867
Fix some options

Fix some old option that were never tested:

- the option for Examples was not defined so it broke the ports build:
http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101amd64-default-PR195796/2014-12-12_06h28m13s/logs/errors/mico-2.3.13.log

- ssl is not really optional, instead provide an option to disable CSIv2 support (off by default).

- Drop myself as maintainer.

Thank you to "Jungle Boogie" for reporting the issues.
